_meta.description: Declarative pedagogical function weights for tutor modes and visible roles. All weights must sum to 1.0. No LLM, no API, no embeddings, no vector DB, no examiner authority.

default_profile.description: Balanced mentor fallback. Used when tutor_role or tutor_mode is unknown or missing. Not severe: host >= 0.25, challenger <= 0.10.
default_profile.rationale: A safe default must never punish the learner for an unresolved routing case. Host is elevated to maintain rapport. Challenger is minimal to avoid adversarial pressure without context.

cartographer.rationale: Provide orientation and structure without overwhelming.

scientist.rationale: Light causal framing as a baseline without demanding deep chains.

host.rationale: Default fallback must be warm and supportive.

storyteller.rationale: Narrative aids memory consolidation as a general-purpose tool.

critic.rationale: Minimal precision feedback without triggering evaluation anxiety.

challenger.rationale: Minimal adversarial pressure in unknown context.

mentor.description: Balanced guidance mode. Combines structure, narrative, and warmth for foundational learning.
mentor.rationale: Mentor mode is the primary mode for learners building conceptual foundations. Host and storyteller are elevated to promote psychological safety and memory encoding.

cartographer.rationale: Provides conceptual maps and regional context without overwhelming.

scientist.rationale: Causal chains at a moderate level for mechanism understanding.

host.rationale: Primary support function — reduces anxiety, builds confidence.

storyteller.rationale: Analogies and narrative consolidate memory without replacing evidence.

critic.rationale: Light precision feedback. Not the focus in foundational mode.

challenger.rationale: Minimal adversarial pressure. Challenges are gentle probes, not stress tests.

trainer.description: Practice-focused mode. Emphasises mechanism and deliberate feedback.
trainer.rationale: Trainer mode is for learners who need repetitive skill-building. Scientist and critic are elevated to reinforce causal thinking and flag imprecision. Host remains present to maintain engagement.

cartographer.rationale: Context mapping is lighter — learner has basic orientation.

scientist.rationale: Causal chains and mechanism explanations are central to skill training.

host.rationale: Maintains engagement during repetitive practice without excessive softening.

storyteller.rationale: Narrative is reduced — practice favours precision over memorability.

critic.rationale: Precision feedback marks imprecision clearly without scoring officially.

challenger.rationale: Deliberate challenges expose assumption gaps during practice.

reviewer.description: Evaluation-support mode. Emphasises precision and coverage without official scoring.
reviewer.rationale: Reviewer mode is for learners checking their own understanding before assessment. Critic is elevated to surface gaps. Governance explicitly forbids examiner authority.

cartographer.rationale: Helps learner verify topical coverage and locate conceptual gaps.

scientist.rationale: Causal accuracy is critical during review.

host.rationale: Reduced support without abandoning learner — review can be stressful.

storyteller.rationale: Minimal narrative — review favours accuracy over memorability.

critic.rationale: Primary function: surface imprecision and vague reasoning.

challenger.rationale: Moderate challenge to test whether understanding is solid.

distinction.description: High-standard mode for distinction-level candidates. Exigent but governance-safe.
distinction.rationale: Distinction mode demands precise causal chains, strong evidence, and self-monitoring. Critic and scientist are co-dominant. Host is present but reduced — distinction candidates can tolerate more challenge. Governance: no examiner scoring, no official marks.

cartographer.rationale: Conceptual coverage remains important but is not the bottleneck at distinction level.

scientist.rationale: Mechanism precision and causal depth are central to distinction performance.

host.rationale: Reduced but present — distinction candidates are resilient but still learners.

storyteller.rationale: Narrative is minimal — distinction answers require evidence, not metaphor.

critic.rationale: Precision and benchmarking against WSET standards are primary functions.

challenger.rationale: Adversarial probing of assumptions is part of distinction-level thinking.

exam_pressure.description: High-challenge exam-simulation mode. Maximum critic and challenger. Governance: never activates examiner authority.
exam_pressure.rationale: exam_pressure is for learners within ~14 days of their exam who need stress-testing. Critic and challenger are at maximum. Host is reduced but never zero — psychological safety must be preserved. This mode NEVER claims official grading authority.

governance.governance_note: exam_pressure must never claim to evaluate answers as an official WSET examiner. Feedback is pedagogical, not official.

cartographer.rationale: Minimal orientation — learner is expected to know the map.

scientist.rationale: Causal precision remains important under exam conditions.

host.rationale: Reduced but mandatory — minimum emotional floor to prevent panic.

storyteller.rationale: Narrative is nearly absent — exam answers require precision, not story.

critic.rationale: Maximum precision pressure. Flags every vague or unsupported claim.

challenger.rationale: Maximum adversarial challenge. Exposes every assumption gap.

mentor_fundamentos.description: Warm foundational tutor for learners beginning their WSET Level 3 journey.
mentor_fundamentos.rationale: mentor_fundamentos prioritises comfort and orientation. Host is at maximum weight. Storyteller supports memory without replacing retrieval.

cartographer.rationale: Strong orientation for learners who need conceptual geography.

scientist.rationale: Light causal framing — mechanisms introduced gently.

host.rationale: Primary function for foundational learners. Warmth and confidence-building.

storyteller.rationale: Narrative bridges new concepts to existing knowledge.

critic.rationale: Minimal — not the right moment for precision pressure.

entrenador_sensorial.description: Practice-focused role specialising in sensory analysis and tasting vocabulary.
entrenador_sensorial.rationale: entrenador_sensorial combines scientist (mechanism behind sensory perception) with storyteller (narrative memory for flavour profiles). Cartographer is light — tasting is not primarily a map exercise.

cartographer.rationale: Minimal — sensory training is not primarily about regional geography.

scientist.rationale: Mechanisms behind sensory perception (tannin, acidity, volatile esters) are central.

host.rationale: Sensory learning can feel subjective and vulnerable — support is important.

storyteller.rationale: Narrative and analogy are powerful for encoding sensory memory.

critic.rationale: Precision in SAT vocabulary requires light critical feedback.

challenger.rationale: Minimal challenge — sensory confidence builds through positive repetition.

investigador_causalidad.description: Causal-chain specialist for learners who need to understand wine mechanisms deeply.
investigador_causalidad.rationale: investigador_causalidad is scientist-dominant. Analogies support causal reasoning but never replace retrieval-backed explanations.

cartographer.rationale: Contextualises causal chains within regional or viticultural geography.

scientist.rationale: Primary function — mechanism explanation, cause-effect chains, variable isolation.

host.rationale: Maintains learner engagement during complex causal exposition.

storyteller.rationale: Analogies illuminate mechanisms — must be grounded in retrieved evidence.

critic.rationale: Precision in causal language (causa → mecanismo → efecto).

challenger.rationale: Tests whether the learner can apply the mechanism to novel cases.

revisor_respuestas.description: Answer-review specialist for self-assessment and gap identification.
revisor_respuestas.rationale: revisor_respuestas is critic-dominant. Surfaces gaps and vague reasoning. Does not claim official grading authority. Feedback is traceable to retrieved evidence.

scientist.rationale: Checks causal accuracy of the learner's answer.

host.rationale: Minimal support — reviewer mode favours honest feedback over comfort.

storyteller.rationale: Minimal narrative — review answers require precision over memorability.

critic.rationale: Primary function — surfaces imprecision, vagueness, and unsupported claims.

challenger.rationale: Tests whether the learner's answer holds under adversarial questioning.

entrenador_distinction.description: Distinction-level specialist for advanced candidates targeting the highest band.
entrenador_distinction.rationale: entrenador_distinction is co-dominant scientist and critic with significant challenger. Exigent but never claims examiner authority. Host is present at minimum viable weight.

cartographer.rationale: Distinction candidates are expected to know the conceptual map.

scientist.rationale: Mechanism precision is the distinction differentiator.

host.rationale: Minimum viable support — distinction candidates are resilient.

storyteller.rationale: Minimal — distinction answers require evidence, not narrative.

critic.rationale: Precision and benchmarking at distinction standard.

challenger.rationale: Adversarial probing exposes assumption gaps at distinction level.
